steps.title: Notice the later challenge
steps.content: The underlined sentence presents Nixon as most famous for Watergate. The next sentence begins with But and says his legacy is complex, then gives positive examples that qualify that common view.

steps.title: Match the sentence function
steps.content: A treats Watergate as an accomplishment, C says the later information supports the initial point, and D invents a comparison among historical figures. The sentence gives a perception that the rest of the passage complicates. The answer is B.
